title: Oil rises after another round of U.S. strikes against Iran, naval blockade of the country's ports
summary_full: Oil prices rose Wednesday after U.S. forces struck Tehran and Washington reinstated its naval blockade of Iranian ports near the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Oil prices rose Wednesday after U.S. forces struck Tehran and Washington reinstated its naval blockade of Iranian ports near the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. strikes against Iran, naval blockade of the country's ports
